_comment: S3 bucket policy for wisebox-documents. Create bucket in ap-southeast-1.

_bucket_structure.documents/{property_id}/{doc_type_slug}/: Property verification documents (PDF, JPG, PNG). Written by Laravel DocumentController.
_bucket_structure.embeddings/{property_id}/{document_id}.j: Future RAG pipeline: chunked document embeddings for vector search.

_setup_steps: 1. Create bucket: aws s3 mb s3://wisebox-documents --region ap-southeast-1
2. Create IAM user: wisebox-s3-prod with programmatic access
3. Attach this policy to the IAM user
4. Add IAM credentials to Railway environment variables
5. Enable versioning: aws s3api put-bucket-versioning --bucket wisebox-documents --versioning-configuration Status=Enabled
6. Set lifecycle rule: transition to IA after 90 days, Glacier after 365 days
